items.text: @zerohedge: *TRUMP SAYS IRAN DEAL SCHEDULED TO BE SIGNED TOMORROW
@unusual_whales: Senior US official: The agreement obliges Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz as a fundamental condition, and it is likely to be opened without any fees.
